rationale: Sampler support should evolve in this repo without disturbing the frozen first-wave synth release.
The current SamplerLab shell exercises source policy, runtime bootstrap, and engine sample-ingest acknowledgements before dedicated recursive sample modules exist.
Future sampler releases should publish their own family and release catalogs once source manifests and sample asset economics are finalized.

families.title: Sampler Wave
families.description: Experimental sampler shells and future recursive sample-module releases.

readiness_gates: sampler patch base profile must remain declared-only
standalone profile may override to standalone-dev for authoring and smoke tests
browser smoke must reach BVST_READY, sampler-loaded, and sampler-engine-loaded
sample source modules and catalogs stay out of the frozen first-wave release until dedicated economics are modeled
